risks: Single-region deployment (eastus) with no zone redundancy — no failover protection for a regional outage
All resources use public endpoints with no private networking or VNet integration
Cosmos DB has publicNetworkAccess set to Enabled — data plane exposed to the internet
ML online endpoint uses key-based auth instead of AAD token auth, reducing zero-trust posture
Storage account uses Standard_LRS — no zone or geo redundancy for ML workspace artifacts
ACR Basic tier (10 GiB) may become insufficient as model image count and size grow
No explicit continuous backup configuration on Cosmos DB for point-in-time recovery
correctionsRecommended: Enable zone redundancy on the Cosmos DB account location (isZoneRedundant: true) for higher availability
Add private endpoints for Key Vault, Storage Account, Cosmos DB, and ML workspace to enforce network isolation
Switch the ML online endpoint authMode from Key to AADToken for zero-trust authentication
Upgrade Storage Account SKU from Standard_LRS to Standard_ZRS for zone-redundant storage of ML artifacts
Enable diagnostic settings on Cosmos DB to forward metrics and logs to the existing Log Analytics workspace
Configure continuous backup on Cosmos DB for point-in-time restore capability
Use managed identity-based RBAC for ML workspace to Cosmos DB access instead of connection strings
